user_prompt: can I put a board definition json inside this local project?
agent_reply: Yes. PlatformIO will pick up custom board manifests from a project-local `boards/` directory.
You can copy the existing M5Stack Core2 board file from:
and edit the local copy. For your current purpose, the useful changes would be:
That removes `-DBOARD_HAS_PSRAM` at the board-definition level and makes PlatformIO’s RAM estimate honest.
This is cleaner than using `build_unflags` plus `board_upload.maximum_ram_size`, because the board identity itself says “Core2 layout, no PSRAM enabled.”
